name: AURA
description: Multi-agent AI skill that detects institutional RWA flows on BNB Chain (BlackRock BUIDL, Franklin Templeton iBENJI, Ondo Finance) and combines them with CoinMarketCap narrative momentum, Fear & Greed, and macro regime signals to generate backtestable rotation strategy specifications. Powered by 6 specialized intelligence agents and Gemini AI strategy generation.
author: Team Data Dragons

required_apis.name: CoinMarketCap Pro API
required_apis.purpose: Narrative trends, Fear & Greed, category data

required_apis.name: DeFiLlama API
required_apis.purpose: BNB Chain RWA TVL data — free, no key required

required_apis.name: PancakeSwap Subgraph
required_apis.purpose: DEX volume data — free, no key required

user_query.description: Optional context or question from the user

demo_output_example.plain_english_brief: BlackRock and Franklin Templeton added $80M to BNB Chain RWA positions this week. Narrative momentum for RWA tokens is at 82/100 while Fear & Greed improved to 42. Rotate 20% into ONDO with a weekly rebalance cadence.
